instructors.name: Sheikh Ahmad Hassan
instructors.title: Head of Quran Studies
instructors.bio: Sheikh Ahmad Hassan is a renowned Quran teacher with over 20 years of experience in teaching Quran memorization and Tajweed. He holds Ijazah in all 10 Qira'at and has trained hundreds of Huffaz (Quran memorizers).
qualifications: Master's in Quranic Sciences from Al-Azhar University

instructors.name: Dr. Fatima Al-Rashid
instructors.title: Arabic Language Director
instructors.bio: Dr. Fatima Al-Rashid is a native Arabic speaker with a PhD in Arabic Linguistics. She has developed innovative teaching methods that help non-native speakers master Arabic in record time.
qualifications: PhD in Arabic Linguistics from University of Jordan
Master's in Teaching Arabic to Non-Native Speakers

instructors.name: Sheikh Muhammad Al-Faruqi
instructors.title: Senior Fiqh Instructor
instructors.bio: Sheikh Muhammad Al-Faruqi is a distinguished scholar of Islamic jurisprudence. He studied under leading scholars in Damascus and Makkah and brings deep traditional knowledge combined with understanding of contemporary issues.
qualifications: Master's in Comparative Fiqh from Umm al-Qura University
Traditional Ijazat from scholars in Syria and Saudi Arabia

instructors.name: Dr. Yusuf Ibrahim
instructors.title: Aqeedah & Theology Professor
instructors.bio: Dr. Yusuf Ibrahim specializes in Islamic theology and comparative religion. He helps students understand the foundations of Islamic belief and equips them to address modern ideological challenges.
qualifications: PhD in Islamic Theology from Islamic University of Madinah

instructors.name: Sheikh Abdullah bin Omar
instructors.title: Hadith Scholar
instructors.bio: Sheikh Abdullah is a specialist in Hadith sciences with extensive training in authentication and chain analysis. He has memorized over 10,000 Hadith with their chains of narration.
qualifications: Master's in Hadith Sciences from Islamic University of Madinah
Ijazah in Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim

instructors.name: Dr. Aisha Rahman
instructors.title: Seerah & Islamic History
instructors.bio: Dr. Aisha Rahman brings Islamic history to life with her engaging teaching style. Her research focuses on the role of women in early Islamic history and she is passionate about making history relevant to modern Muslims.
qualifications: PhD in Islamic History from SOAS, University of London
Bachelor's in History and Islamic Studies
